title: Monday to JIra Integration -Problems
excerpt:
Hi All :slight_smile:

posts.author: assafeitan (Assaf Eitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All
I’m Having problems with the integration between Monday to JIra.
The sync from Jira to Monday, works quite well for me.
But The other way around- namely, From Monday To Jira -Doesn’t And ill Explain:
When I open a task On Monday (after activating the integration of course)
It does creates it On my Jira project but it doesn’t get updated when I update the task On monday.
Anyone knows what may be the problem?
Also- Is there a way to update the timeline from jira to monday? Because it lets me only choose myself the Date when I activate the integration and I Want it to be automated.
Thanks In Advance For Any Help!!
Assaf Eitan

posts.author: JacekWizmur (Jacek Wizmur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @assafeitan,
That’s a common issue. And there is a solution in form of an app (not yet on the Monday Marketplace, but we’re getting there soon) - our getint.io will create, and update tasks on both sides (Jira, and Monday) including custom fields, comments, statuses, and attachments.
Try it out for free here (getint.io monday integration)
best,
Jacek (Co-Founder)
